articles.author: Robin Kemp
articles.title: Larry Baker wins Liberty County Commission District 1 Democratic runoff
articles.rationale: Election result is positive for the winner but mixed overall given incumbent's legal troubles; reporting is balanced and factual, including innocent-until-proven-guilty caveats.

articles.author: Maggie Lee
articles.title: Legislature 101: What is a special legislative session?
articles.rationale: Neutral civics explainer describing the mechanics of a special session; factual and balanced with no positive or negative slant.

articles.author: Bill Barrow/The Associated Press
articles.title: Georgia Republican legislative leaders reject governor’s call for 2028 redistricting
articles.rationale: Negative-leaning subject involving contested partisan/racial redistricting; mostly factual but framing emphasizing voter disenfranchisement and Jim Crow comparisons tilts tone slightly critical of GOP effort.

articles.author: Maya Homan/Georgia Recorder
articles.title: July 1 QR code deadline looms as lawmakers puzzle over Georgia’s election system
articles.rationale: Reports unresolved legislative deadlock over election equipment, a negative situation, but written as balanced straight news quoting multiple sides without editorial slant.

articles.author: Craig Nelson, Jabari Gibbs
articles.title: Hollowell overtakes Griggs in Coastal Georgia congressional race
articles.rationale: Reports a hard-fought primary win with celebration framing, but tempered by underdog odds; coverage is balanced, giving both candidates fair treatment.

articles.author: Mary Landers
articles.title: Primaries and runoffs are over, but one PSC race lingers
articles.rationale: Procedural reporting on a close PSC race recount; neutral factual framing, slight negative from contested election context and residency questions noted objectively.

articles.author: Ty Tagami/Capitol Beat News Service
articles.title: Lawmakers seek to delay QR code voting ban while adding property tax cuts for homeowners
articles.rationale: Procedural legislative coverage of delaying QR code ban and advancing property tax cuts; factual and balanced framing with no editorial slant, slight positive from tax relief.

articles.author: Jill Nolin/Georgia Recorder
articles.title: Democrats block local property tax referendums as Georgia lawmakers clash over affordability
articles.rationale: Coverage of legislative gridlock and partisan conflict is moderately negative in valence, but the reporting quotes both sides evenly and stays balanced, yielding neutral tone.

articles.author: Maya Homan/Georgia Recorder
articles.title: Bill extending Georgia’s ballot QR code deadline clears Senate in a Saturday vote
articles.rationale: Contentious partisan legislative fight conveys mild negativity, but reporting is balanced, quoting both sponsor and Democratic critics without editorial slant.

articles.author: Sarah Harwell
articles.title: Juneteenth In Coastal Georgia: Heritage, history
articles.rationale: Celebratory coverage of community Juneteenth events yields positive valence; tone is mostly descriptive though warm framing of heritage and unity leans slightly favorable, with grim massacre history noted factually.

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Georgia Democrats blast requirement to recount votes by hand in bill that would keep ballot QR codes
articles.rationale: Reports partisan conflict over hand-recount requirement with concerns about chaos and errors (negative valence), but presents both sides factually with balanced quotes (neutral tone).

articles.author: Guy German, Binghamton University, State University of New York
articles.title: FDA approves new sunscreen ingredient
articles.rationale: Positive valence from FDA approval of a beneficial sunscreen ingredient; expert explainer is mostly informative but mildly favorable toward bemotrizinol's benefits.

articles.author: Emily Jones/WABE, Grist
articles.title: Georgia is losing farmland fast
articles.rationale: Negative valence from staggering farmland loss and developer pressure, partly offset by a hopeful new conservation program; reporting is balanced and objective.

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Georgia’s QR codes for scanning ballots will remain for midterms after lawmakers delay fix
articles.rationale: Procedural legislative story about a contested voting method with quoted criticism, reported neutrally; slightly negative valence from ongoing controversy and doubt over election integrity.

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Oceans-monitoring network back on track
articles.rationale: Reversal of dismantling plan is a positive outcome; reporting is mostly factual but quotes calling decision 'supreme stupidity' and framing of broader science retreat lean slightly critical.

articles.author: Robin Kemp
articles.title: Liberty County Development Authority to seek more data on local rivers
articles.rationale: Reports a unanimous vote for more river testing framed as a small win for residents, but topic involves ongoing conflict; writing stays factual and balanced.
